g.text: epicd Use Cases — View 2/2: Work-item lifecycle across lanes (lane = pipeline_id; PLANNED, today baime-run)
epicd — one board, multiple lanes (field = (sourceId, pipeline_id))
Execution lane (pipeline_id = execution · PLANNED; today baime loop-backlog)
NOT the deprecated drafts/ folder. `kind` label ROUTES which refine handler runs.
独立 Agent · architect 评审
Runtime layers ("engine" fans out — NOT synonyms):
supervisor=监督器/受管 Bun 服务 · driver=驱动器/scanner/scan-loop · interpreter=解释器 · worker=执行体/Handler
LANE terminology: lane ≡ pipeline_id (this axis). Type axis =
derived from tree position — baime's kind:basic/kind:epic "lane label" is that role axis, renamed here.
ENG-8: worker must NOT self-write `done`; engine re-runs DoD then decides.
Replaces baime `.agent-done-*` sentinel. Merge lock: engine proper-lockfile
vs old loop `.merge-lock` — two names = corruption risk (BACK-600.5 AC#1).
